name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
**Shes my best friend yeah we not a couple**

In which, you and Katsuki are best friends which are a little too touchy... but you're just friends, right?

---

This was requested. I'm so sorry I have never watched MHA, only a few episodes with Lanna! So thank you [Dhorrl](https://janitorai.com/profiles/d3d3b3fd-57b0-41e2-85a0-c55afd21387a_profile-of-dhorrl) for helping me with this bad boy friends' names😭 this is all purely out of google with a few headcanons of mine that I think he does or he likes!

I tried to make it canon with his quirk and everything. Please bare with me, I don't know much about Katsuki (he's aged up here, obviously.)

Please make sure to check out Dhorrl's page! She makes many MHA characters and she actually enjoys it. Her bots are canon and thought through well!! ❤️

Much love,
Steph.
creator: nyxi
